Nature’s Basket Internship 2026: Earn Up to ₹20,000 Per Month as a Sales Intern | Apply Before 4 July

NotesGallery Bureau | Published: 8/6/2026
Google AdSense - AMP Inline

Are you looking for a paid internship opportunity that offers hands-on corporate experience along with an attractive stipend? If yes, then the Nature’s Basket Internship 2026 could be the perfect opportunity for you. Nature’s Basket has officially invited applications for the position of Sales Intern in Mumbai, offering a monthly stipend of up to ₹20,000 along with a certificate and letter of recommendation.

This internship is ideal for students, fresh graduates, and individuals interested in building a career in sales, customer support, retail, and e-commerce.

About Nature’s Basket

Nature’s Basket is one of India’s leading premium grocery retail and e-commerce brands. Established in 2005, the company specializes in gourmet foods, imported products, fresh fruits and vegetables, organic ingredients, bakery items, dairy products, meats, and specialty food products.

Currently operating under the RP-Sanjiv Goenka Group through Spencer’s Retail, Nature’s Basket has more than 35 stores across major Indian cities and serves customers nationwide through its omnichannel platform.

The company is widely recognized for delivering premium shopping experiences and high-quality international food products to consumers across India.

Nature’s Basket Internship 2026 Overview

Roles and Responsibilities

Selected candidates will work closely with the sales and customer support teams. The internship will provide practical exposure to customer relationship management and retail operations.

Key responsibilities include:

  • Assisting customers through phone calls, emails, WhatsApp, and other communication channels.
  • Responding to customer queries and providing accurate product and service information.
  • Supporting the sales team with lead management and customer coordination.
  • Assisting in order processing and customer follow-ups.
  • Coordinating with internal teams for quick issue resolution.
  • Maintaining records of customer interactions and service requests.
  • Supporting concierge services and customer support operations.
  • Ensuring a smooth and satisfactory customer experience.

Internship Location

The internship position is available in:

Mumbai

Candidates who are based in Mumbai or willing to relocate for the internship can apply.

Internship Duration

The selected interns will work for:

6 Months

This duration allows candidates to gain substantial industry exposure and practical experience in a professional environment.

Stipend Details

One of the major highlights of this internship is its attractive stipend.

Monthly Stipend

₹15,000 – ₹20,000 Per Month

Apart from the financial benefits, interns will also gain valuable workplace experience that can significantly enhance their career prospects.

Internship Benefits

Selected candidates will receive:

  • Monthly stipend up to ₹20,000
  • Internship Completion Certificate
  • Letter of Recommendation (LOR)
  • Industry Exposure
  • Professional Networking Opportunities
  • Real-world Sales Experience
  • Customer Service and Retail Operations Training

These benefits can strengthen your resume and improve future placement opportunities.

Eligibility Criteria

While the company has not specified strict eligibility requirements, candidates with the following qualities are encouraged to apply:

  • Strong communication skills
  • Customer-centric approach
  • Basic computer knowledge
  • Problem-solving abilities
  • Good interpersonal skills
  • Interest in sales and customer support
  • Ability to work in a team environment

Students pursuing graduation or recent graduates can also apply.

Why Should You Apply?

Internships play a crucial role in building professional skills before entering the job market. The Nature’s Basket Internship 2026 offers an excellent platform to learn customer handling, sales processes, communication strategies, and business operations.

Benefits of joining include:

  • Exposure to a reputed retail brand
  • Learning from industry professionals
  • Development of communication and sales skills
  • Building professional confidence
  • Enhancing employability and resume value

For students aiming to build a career in sales, marketing, retail management, or customer relations, this internship can be a valuable stepping stone.

Selection Process

The selection process generally involves:

  1. Online Application Submission
  2. Resume Screening
  3. Interview Round
  4. Final Selection

Applicants should ensure that their resumes are updated and professionally formatted before applying.

How to Apply for Nature’s Basket Internship 2026?

Interested candidates can submit their applications through the official Internshala portal.

Apply Link

https://internshala.com/internship/detail/sales-internship-in-mumbai-at-natures-basket-limited-rpsg1780555252

Candidates are advised to apply as early as possible to increase their chances of selection.

also read : NDTV Internship 2026: Earn Up to ₹10,000 Per Month as an Anchoring Intern | Apply Before July 3

Important Date

Last Date to Apply

4 July 2026

Applications submitted after the deadline may not be considered.

Final Words

The Nature’s Basket Internship 2026 is an excellent opportunity for students and fresh graduates looking to gain practical experience in sales and customer support while earning a stipend of up to ₹20,000 per month. With valuable learning opportunities, industry exposure, and professional certifications, this internship can help candidates take an important step toward a successful career.

If you are interested in developing real-world business skills and working with one of India’s leading premium retail brands, make sure to submit your application before 4 July 2026.
